title: Opticianry Mission and Vision
content:
Opticianry Mission and Vision

Mission

To train the main staffs who will work in the field of optician. Having the basic optician knowledge, knowing and applying the optician related systems, using the optician package programs, knowing the eye and human anatomy, planning the operation and management of a business, knowing and using optical instruments, making the frame and glass selection and assembly according to the data, and to train health technicians who can make work programs, market the product and have general public health knowledge.

Vision

To become a leader and pioneer training institution in the training of technical staff who are entrepreneurial and self-renewing, adopting the philosophy of total quality and supporting the relevant institutional processes, knowing the environmental, social and ethical problems related to the profession and respecting their occupational health and safety measures.
